title: MoonBlur
description: A vanilla themed texture pack to improve pvp experience
body:
# MoonBlur
MoonBlur is a sleek vanilla revamp PvP texture pack designed for clarity, precision, and smooth visuals. It enhances the default Minecraft look with subtle color adjustments, refined armor shading, clean sword models, and slightly blurred yet sharp-edged particle effects. The pack keeps the original Minecraft feel but adds a modern, polished tone perfect for competitive PvP. With optimized visuals for low-latency gameplay and a minimalist aesthetic, MoonBlur delivers smooth performance and crystal-clear combat feedback without sacrificing the vanilla charm.

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

some textures were in fact taken from vanilla tweaks so credit to them!
